segments.text: They're opting to camp below the ledge here
segments.original_text: ここで崖下での採掘を選択しています

segments.text: That won't work with Homura though, right?
segments.original_text: これホムラだと無理ですね

segments.text: With Hikari you could still land an edgeguard
segments.original_text: ヒカリならまだ復帰阻止かけられそうですけど

segments.text: But switching to Homura - is that really the move?
segments.original_text: ホムラに変わったのにいいですかね

full_text: They're opting to camp below the ledge here That won't work with Homura though, right? Exactly With Hikari you could still land an edgeguard But switching to Homura - is that really the move? Yeah...

corrections.original: 触体かけられそうですけど
corrections.corrected: 復帰阻止かけられそうですけど
